data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and the Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: IDF strikes across Lebanon amid Hezbollah ceasefire violations, exchanges of fire • Shipping traffic through Hormuz remains muted with no US-Iran deal in sight
